data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-aae0-refine-scope-pending (commit 71124b72cb76). Added scope-refinement-pending-store.ts Zustand store tracking pending beatIds. HeaderActions now uses store for disabled state and shows 'Refinement pending' with spinning icon while awaiting completion. useScopeRefinementNotifications hook calls markComplete on detected completions to re-enable the button. All quality gates pass: lint clean, tsc clean, 200 test files (2320 tests) pass, build succeeds.
